releaseNotes:
## DLLRunTool v1.3.0

### Kubernetes (moi)
- Tab **Kubernetes** tren rail trai: quan ly cluster tu kubeconfig tren may (giao dien kieu Lens)
- Xem Pods, Deployments, Services va tai nguyen khac sau khi chon cluster
- **Terminal PowerShell nhung**: nhieu tab, keo resize chieu cao
- **Dang nhap cloud** (az login, get-credentials) ngay trong tool; bam **Quet lai** sau khi cap nhat kubeconfig
- Chuyen tab Dich vu va Kubernetes **khong ngat** ket noi cluster
- Cau hinh cluster luu tai k8s.local.json (khong dua vao zip release)

### Giao dien
- Icon Kubernetes mau vang tren rail (giong Handbook)
- Console Log bo goc card; banner secrets an khi mo Handbook/Kubernetes
- Sidebar K8s: chua ket noi hien danh sach cluster; da ket noi hien menu tai nguyen + nut quay lai doi cluster

### Khac
- Tab **Handbook**: tra cuu kien truc source Loyalty
- Khoi dong mac dinh vao Dich vu -> Back-End (sua restore tab cu sai)
